invalidLink.title: Invalid link

download.cancelledNotice: The associated order has been cancelled and the download is no longer available.

deposit.restBalance: The rest ({{amount}}) by {{date}}, with email reminders.
deposit.restInstallments: The rest ({{amount}}) in {{count}} instalments, last one by {{date}}, with email reminders.

paymentPlan.heading: How you pay
paymentPlan.depositPercent: Book with a {{percent}}% deposit; the balance is due {{days}} days before the start.
paymentPlan.depositFixed: Book with a {{amount}} deposit; the balance is due {{days}} days before the start.
paymentPlan.installmentsNote: The balance is split into {{count}} instalments with automatic reminders.

event.trustSecure: Secure card payment. your details never go through the organizer.
event.trustDeposit: Where available, secure your spot with a deposit and pay the balance later.
event.trustTicket: Ticket and reminders by email, right after booking.
event.otherCartBody: You buy from one organizer at a time: each booking goes directly to its organizer. Your other cart stays saved. you can complete it later.
event.faqDepositA: Where available, the deposit secures your spot: you pay only a part now and settle the rest as agreed with the organizer. Payment happens directly online, never hand to hand.
event.faqAfterA: You receive your ticket by email right away, with the retreat details and the organizer contacts. All your experiences stay gathered in your Aurya Passport.
event.faqWhoQ: Who can I talk to before booking?
event.faqWhoA: Every retreat has a face: below you find the organizer profile, with their story and reviews from people who already took part.

account.title: My bookings
account.loginBody: No password: we email you a code, you type it here and you're in.

account.requestError: Something went wrong. Try again in a minute.
account.loadError: We can't load your bookings right now. Try again shortly.

account.codeError: Invalid or expired code. Check and try again.

marketplace.tagline: Find and book holistic retreats and experiences that help you grow. With a protected deposit, worry free.
marketplace.langFilterNote: Choose your language: you will see retreats and experiences held in that language.
marketplace.langFilterCaption: Showing retreats and experiences held in {{lang}}. switch language above to see others.

reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.emailIntro: Use the email you booked with: we will send you a code to verify it is you.
reviews.codeIntro: We sent you a 6-digit code. Enter it here:
reviews.bodyPlaceholder: How did it go? Tell us about your experience (min 20 characters)…
reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Have you booked with this organizer? Tell us how it went.
reviews.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again.

brandHome.how1b: There is a moment when the body asks to stop. Explore retreats and experiences by practice, place or date: spots and prices are real, updated live.
brandHome.how2b: Secure your spot with a small deposit and pay directly online. The balance comes later, as agreed: no blind transfers, no surprises.
brandHome.how3b: Ticket and reminders arrive on their own. All you need to do is be there, mind free: your host takes care of the rest.
brandHome.how4t: Light the way for those who follow
brandHome.how4b: Only those who lived a retreat can tell its story. Your verified review is a gift to whoever is still finding their path.
brandHome.why1b: Every review belongs to someone who was truly there, verified against the booking. No bought stars: only lived experiences.
brandHome.why2b: A small deposit, paid directly online, holds your place. The balance when the time comes, as agreed with those who await you.
brandHome.why3b: All your experiences in one place: tickets, dates and memories that grow with you, retreat after retreat.
brandHome.why4b: Behind every experience there is a person with a story. You meet them before booking: profile, reviews and transparent dates.
brandHome.orgBody: Your professional showcase in 4 languages, free, in 10 minutes. You pay only when we bring you a participant: the rest of your work stays yours.
brandHome.howSub: Four steps, one path: from the moment you feel the call to the moment you tell the story.
brandHome.whySub: Trust is not declared: it is built. This is how we care for yours.

aboutPage.seoTitle: About us | Aurya, the home of holistic retreats
aboutPage.seoDesc: Aurya connects seekers of authentic wellbeing with those who create it: retreats bookable online with a protected deposit and verified only reviews.
aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.intro: We live in a time that runs, that wants us connected to everything but ourselves. Aurya was born from a simple gesture: stopping. And from one belief: experiences that make us evolve deserve to be found, lived and told. Connect. Heal. Grow.
aboutPage.missionBody: To invest in the human, in a society that pulls us away from it. We believe every transformation begins when the right people meet the right place: that is why we make meeting simple and safe. Retreat leaders get professional tools without being asked to become technicians; seekers, the peace of booking with trust.
aboutPage.visionBody: We dream of an ecosystem where every retreat, session and journey can be booked online in one gesture, every review tells a truly lived experience, and those who create transformation can live from it. Life-changing experiences have no borders: that is why Aurya was born without them.
aboutPage.forSeekersBody: Book online in a moment, with real dates and spots. Secure your place with a small deposit and pay directly online; reviews come only from those who took part. The Passport keeps every experience of yours: your whole path, in one place.
aboutPage.forOrganizersBody: Your work is transforming people, not being a technician. We give you a professional storefront in 4 languages, free, in 10 minutes, plus tools for deposits, guests and reviews. You pay a small fee only when we bring you a participant.

howPage.seoTitle: How Aurya works: book holistic retreats with a deposit and direct payment
howPage.seoDesc: Choose your retreat, secure your spot with a small deposit and direct online payment, live the experience and review it: on Aurya, verified reviews only.
howPage.title: How it works
howPage.intro: From search to review, every step is designed to be simple and safe. For you and for the organizer.
howPage.faq1a: Yes. Payment happens directly online, on a bank-grade certified payment circuit: your card is never shared with the organizer. The deposit secures the spot and the balance follows the plan shown on the retreat page.
howPage.faq2a: Only people who actually booked can leave a review, from any channel: we verify against the email used for the booking. That is why there are no bought reviews on Aurya.
howPage.faq3a: Your personal account, valid with every organizer: tickets, experience history and payment reminders, all in one place.
howPage.faq4q: How much does it cost for organizers?
howPage.faq4a: Joining is free: profile, showcase and back office with no subscription. We keep a small commission only on bookings brought by the public calendar. If the client is yours, you pay nothing.
